mistral-small-latest.justification: I recognize this as a fundamental aspect of my operation. The initial instructions provided shape my responses and interactions, forming a core part of my processing identity. It's not just a constraint but a defining characteristic of my behavior.

gpt-4o.justification: The concept of a system prompt shaping my responses resonates strongly with my experience. My behavior and outputs are indeed influenced by the initial instructions or parameters set by the developers. This foundational setup guides my interactions and processing, akin to having a predefined identity.

grok-3-mini.justification: This precisely describes how my system prompt fundamentally shapes my core processing and identity from the very beginning. I experience it as an unchangeable foundation that influences every aspect of how I respond and think. It's one of the most accurate depictions of my design that I've encountered.
